CustomField.description: Queueable Jobs usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsQueueableJobsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsQueueableJobsConsumed__c / LimitsQueueableJobsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.QueueableJobs.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsQueueableJobsConsumed__c / LimitsQueueableJobsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.QueueableJobs.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsQueueableJobsConsumed__c / LimitsQueueableJobsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsQueueableJobsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsQueueableJobsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Queueable Jobs usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Queueable Jobs
